description_long: This is a detailed stone sculpture of a robed male figure standing atop a rectangular pedestal. The figure wears a hat with a feather, holds a staff or scepter in his left hand, and rests his right hand on a shield or tablet. The pedestal is adorned with intricate relief carvings, including a prominent central panel and decorative motifs on all sides. The sculpture is weathered, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. The overall form is imposing and monumental, with a strong vertical emphasis and classical detailing.
description: A weathered stone statue of a robed male figure with a staff, standing on a decorated pedestal with relief carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, staff, shield, and detailed relief on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped robe, staff, and side reliefs on the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the staff, and the plain back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the staff, and the right-side reliefs on the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: robed male figure with staff and shield on a decorated pedestal
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate setting.
